case_title: FRANCISCO CERVANTES ET AL VS. DERELL YOUNG ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,829.01 FILED BY CERVANTES, FRANCISCO SEGURA, CYNTHIA AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, DERELL LOPEZ, ALEJANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CERTIFIED MAILED CLAIM SENT TO DERELL YOUNG RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-29-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CYNTHIA SEGURA. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO CERVANTES OR DEFENDANTS DERELL YOUNG & ALEJANDRA LOPEZ. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE ASSISTED MS. SEGURA DURING TODAY'S PROCEEDINGS. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. A SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO PLAINTIFFS TO ASSIST THEM AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CERVANTES, FRANCISCO SEGURA, CYNTHIA AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, DERELL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CERVANTES, FRANCISCO SEGURA, CYNTHIA AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ALEJANDRA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-27-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS FRANCISCO CERVANTES & CYNTHIA SEGURA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS DERELL YOUNG OR ALEJANDRA LOPEZ. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO EITHER DEFENDANT. A SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO MR. CERVANTES TO ASSIST HIM AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CYNTHIA SEGURA WHO REPORTS THE CLAIM WILL BE SETTLED VIA INSURANCE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO CERVANTES. NO APEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS DERELL YOUNG OR ALEJANDRA LOPEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED TO ALEJANDRA LOPEZ RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD
